## Summary

Fixes the typos in the labels of two hepatic sinusoid terms reported in issue #3613.

| Term | Old label | New label |
| --- | --- | --- |
| UBERON:0009548 | hepatic sinusoid of left **of** lobe of liver | hepatic sinusoid of left lobe of liver |
| UBERON:0009549 | hepatic sinusoid of right **of** lobe of liver | hepatic sinusoid of right lobe of liver |

The original labels contained an erroneous extra `of` between `left`/`right` and `lobe`.

## Rationale

- The corrected names align with the existing parent terms `UBERON:0001115 ! left lobe of liver` and `UBERON:0001114 ! right lobe of liver` (already referenced via `part_of` and `develops_in`).
- The pre-existing definitions (`"A hepatic sinusoid that is part of a left/right lobe of liver."`) and the EXACT synonyms (`"left/right lobe hepatic sinusoids"`) already used the correct phrasing, confirming the labels were typos.
- No other axioms, synonyms, xrefs, or definitions needed changing.

- [x] Confirmed both terms exist in `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo`
- [x] Used `obo-checkout.pl` / `obo-checkin.pl` workflow rather than editing the edit file directly
- [x] Reserialized `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo` with `robot convert`
- [x] Verified the diff is limited to the two `name:` lines
- [x] Committed on the issue branch

- [ ] Visual review of the diff
- [ ] CI passes (ODK QC, reasoner)
